snippets.snippet: The room very clean and near to restaurant.
Indeed, Diara bungalow met my expectations on point.
Cheap bungalow with the amazing view
A very good location, less than 10m from coral reefs.
Couldn't have asked for a better stay
There is a kitchen so you can cook your own food.

usefulInfo.name: License Id / Local Tax ID/ Entity Name

description.short: Get your trip off to a great start with a stay at this property, which offers car park free of charge. Conveniently situated in the Sabang part of Aceh, this property puts you close to attractions and interesting dining options.

details.title: Infant 0-1 year(s)
details.description: Stay for free if using existing bedding. Note, if you need a cot, it may incur an extra charge and is subject to availability.

details.title: Children 2-7 year(s)
details.description: Stay for free if using existing bedding.

adult: Guests 8 years and older are considered adults.
extraBed: Extra beds are dependent on the room you choose. Please check the individual room capacity for more details.
additional: When booking more than 5 rooms, different policies and additional supplements may apply.

featureGroups.name: Things to do, ways to relax

features.featureName: Hot water linen and laundry washing

hotelFacilities.name: Cleaned following Agoda or health guidelines

reviewSnippets: The ocean is right on your doorstep.
There is a kitchen so you can cook your own food.
Cheap bungalow with the amazing view
Very nice view from the balcony.
Cheap bungalow with the amazing view

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: The bungalow is right by the sea, allowing you to see Rubia Island at any time, ensuring privacy as if you were on a deserted island. It is a cost-effective accommodation where you can always swim and wash up at your lodging. It is a great spot for sunrise. You can enjoy the carefully prepared meals by the bungalow staff, and there are many restaurants nearby, ensuring affordable dining options.
comments.originalComment: 방갈로가 바로 바다와 접하고 있어서 언제나 루비아섬을 볼수 있고, 무인도에 있듯 사생활이 보장된다. 언제나 해수욕을 하고 숙소에서 씻을 수 있는 가성비 높은 숙소이다. 일출 맛집이다. 방갈로 스탭들의 정성스런 요리를 이용할수도 있고 주변에 많은 맛집들이 있으니, 가성비 있는 식사는 보장된다.

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewPositives: Its all good, clean, the staff are good, the food, view, everything was good

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments:
Diara Bungalow is an amazing accommodation that is perfect for family vacations. The rooms are spacious and clean, with simple yet comfortable decor.

With affordable prices and satisfying services, I highly recommend Diara Bungalow to anyone looking for an authentic and comfortable stay experience.
comments.reviewTitle: The view is very beautiful right in front of Rubiah Island.
comments.originalTitle: View yang sangat indah langsung di depan pulau rubiah
comments.originalComment:
Diara Bungalow adalah tempat menginap yang menakjubkan dan sangat cocok untuk liburan keluarga, Kamar-kamarnya luas dan bersih, dengan dekorasi yang sederhana namun nyaman.

Dengan harga yang terjangkau dan layanan yang memuaskan, saya sangat merekomendasikan Diara Bungalow untuk siapa saja yang ingin merasakan pengalaman menginap yang autentik dan nyaman.

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewNegatives: We could only spend two nights there :(
comments.reviewPositives:
Guys please don't listen to the other reviews, these guys are putting all their effort into making a place like this, which is not really touristic and hasn't some of the facilities that we're used to have, an enjoyable place!
They have two kind of rooms, one is a wooden room for the more adventurous, the other one in cement is more welcoming if you're not comfortable living inside nature (and all that belongs from her).
We've chosen the cement one, the room was super clean, there were some ants but it's normal in a place like this, the girls running the place doesn't really speak english so you have to talk with the "manager" to get info or food from their restaurant, but i'll assure you he's really responsive and even if they're not perfect with the language they'll do all they can to make you feel at home.
For everything else the pictures talk for themselves, amazing view from the room, amazing sea, amazing snorkeling right in front of the rooms, and a lot of uncontamined nature including monkeys and other animals!
Also sleeping with the sounds of nature and waking up with the sunrise is a plus i would say!

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: The service is very friendly, the place is great, directly facing the sea where you can play in the water and enjoy the morning sunset.
comments.originalComment: Pelayanannya ramah kali, tempatny ok, langsung menghadap ke laut dan bisa bermain air,menikmati sunset pagi..

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewPositives: Super nice staff and owner always available online with prompt response. All rooms and bungalows directly on water. You can hear the waves all night.

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: The boss and the staff are very kind. Anyone who enjoys the peaceful nature will love it here. You can relax on the hammock, enjoy a nap, go snorkeling, and savor delicious meals while having a leisurely time. When I come back, I will only stay at Diara.
comments.originalComment: 사장님과 직원분들이 너무 친절합니다.평화로운 자연을 즐기는  분이라면 누구나 좋아할거예요.해먹에 누워  낮잠을 즐기고 스노클링을 하고 맛있는 식사를 하며 여유로운 시간을 즐길 수 있어요.다시 돌아오면 디아라에서만 있을 거예요.

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewNegatives: Estaba descuidado y un poco sucio
comments.reviewPositives: La ubicación

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: Very satisfying with the price offered, a straightforward view, clean and tidy rooms, the place is simple but meets the needs during the vacation.
comments.originalComment: Sangat memuaskan dengan harga yang ditawarkan, view yang lurus biasa, kamar yang bersih dan rapi, tempat nya simple tapi mencukupi kebutuhan saat liburan,

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewNegatives: En la cabaña el colchón terrible, combado y se clavan los muelles y sonaba algo vivo que se movía dentro. Caen cosas en el techo por la noche y suena muchísimo. El baño… no es para cualquiera…
comments.reviewPositives: El personal encantador
comments.reviewTitle: Baratísimo pero no es para cualquiera

subReview.text: Very good room comfort and quality
subReview.name: Room comfort and quality

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: The bungalow is right by the sea, allowing you to see Rubia Island at any time, ensuring privacy as if you were on a deserted island. It is a cost-effective accommodation where you can always swim and wash up at your lodging. It is a great spot for sunrise. You can enjoy the carefully prepared meals by the bungalow staff, and there are many restaurants nearby, ensuring affordable dining options.
comments.originalComment: 방갈로가 바로 바다와 접하고 있어서 언제나 루비아섬을 볼수 있고, 무인도에 있듯 사생활이 보장된다. 언제나 해수욕을 하고 숙소에서 씻을 수 있는 가성비 높은 숙소이다. 일출 맛집이다. 방갈로 스탭들의 정성스런 요리를 이용할수도 있고 주변에 많은 맛집들이 있으니, 가성비 있는 식사는 보장된다.

subReview.text: Very good room comfort and quality
subReview.name: Room comfort and quality

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: easy access to the beach. And also very private. The room very clean and near to restaurant. Plus point, the beach in front the room very clean and the water is very2 nice.

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewNegatives: Que no hubiera papelera ni pestillo
comments.reviewPositives: Las vistas son increíbles, tiene un muelle donde puedes hacer snorkel y hay bastantes peces. La habitación normalita, el lavabo podría ser mejor pero por ese precio no se puede pedir mucho más.

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments:
I booked the place with high expectations. Indeed, Diara bungalow met my expectations on point. 

Looking around the nearby Bungalow, some might offer better facility or better environment. In overall, Diara bungalow wins by the services.

The host, Budi, been extremely helpful in ground / transportation suggestion. Very responsible and responsive host.

The ground staff who manage the place been extremely accommodative. Friendly chatters too.

If you ask me, will I visit again? YES!

As long as the host continue to maintain and upgrade the overall facility like better aircond, hot shower, larger dock and etc. It will be the top 5 staying place of this location for sure.

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewPositives:
Cabañas muy sencillas pero con vistas inmejorables. Aunque hay mosquitos en otras zonas cercanas, en los bungalows de Diara no vimos ninguno. 
El alojamiento cuenta con restaurante pero la carta es muy limitada, algo picante y el servicio es lento por lo que casi siempre comimos en otros restaurantes.

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments:
Very nice view from the balcony.
The cabin is basic, with a toilet with no hot water (it's fine as it's hot) and fan (not need AC as the cabin doesn't get hot inside). There is a water refill machine.
You can do snorkel in front of the room.
Short walk to restaurants and shops.
Lovely staff and very helpful. 
We recommend it.

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewNegatives: El bungalow es muy básico y no es especialmente agradable, ni muy limpio. Sirve para dormir pero no apetece estar dentro de la casa mucho tiempo. Dado que se encuentra en la naturaleza, entraron pequeños animales por los agujeros (ratón, gekko, mosquitos). El baño no esta muy limpio, tiene water y ducha pero no tiene lavabo. No tiene wifi. El personal no habla mucho inglés, pero son muy amables. Me ayudaron a quitar el gekko del baño. No tiene mosquitera en la ventana/puerta. Por la noche puede hacer mucho calor, hay que poner el ventilador que está cerca a la cama. En la realidad me pareció peor que en las fotos.
comments.reviewPositives: Lo mejor es la terraza con la hamaca y las vistas. El personal era sonriente y me atendieron bien si tenía algun problema. Pedí agua caliente con vasos que me trajeron así pude tomar té y café en la terraza mirando al mar. El lugar es precioso.

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments:
So far the room it’s ok, waking up in the morning with the sound of waves so relaxing and also sunrise
Bathroom water cleanliness must be improved because lots of rubbish from the roof

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewNegatives: J'ai très peu apprécié les rats qui nichaient dans mon sommier. L’équipement etait très sommaire .
comments.reviewPositives:
L’emplacement du bungalow est très bien, au dessus de la mer, belle vue, hamac sur la terrasse. 
La jeune fille de la réception était très gentille et serviable.

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments:
+ sehr schneller Kontakt über WhatsApp möglich 
+ Wunderschöne Lage, direktes aufwachen beim Sonnenaufgang 

- ziemlich alt und heruntergekommen
- Personal spricht gar kein Englisch, was grundsätzlich kein Problem wäre, aber irgendwie gelöst werden muss, den dies führte zu vielen Missverständnissen und benötigte einfach sehr viel Energie und Zeit.
- es war leider gar nicht sauber eine Nacht war alles voller Ameisen 
- Preis ist über Agoda zubteier
comments.reviewTitle: Wunderschön gelegen, Rest leider nicht gut

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewNegatives: Ne parle qu Indonésien. Manque de petites réparations. Quasi aucun mobilier dans le bungalow.
comments.reviewPositives: Bien placé, à 500 m du village et au calme. Bungalows au bord de l'eau avec terrasse. Spacieux et très bon lit. Accès à la mer, avec reste de corail et poissons pour petit snorkeling. Très bon restaurant à proximité.

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: Great view over the water with hammocks and chairs. After that it goes bad fast. Super basic bungalow, not so clean, and the rats come out at night. Scurry above the ceiling and keep you up at night, and come down into the bungalow as well. I would not stay again.
comments.reviewTitle: Some good but too much bad

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewNegatives: Logement sale ( surtout la salle de bain), pas de lavabo, dangereux (on peut passer à travers du plancher bois à tout moment), nous avons eu la visite d un rat pendant la nuit , prises à 1, 80 m du sol ( impossible de brancher la fontaine à eau pour faire chauffer l eau), bref pas à la hauteur de l emplacement
comments.reviewPositives: L’emplacement est super. Hôte réactive et disponible

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: Cheap bungalow with an amazing view
comments.originalComment: Cheap bungalow with the amazing view

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewPositives:
Bungalow  juste en face de l'eau. 
Possibilité de faire du snorkeling juste en face du bungalow. 
Bon rapport qualité prix. 
Personnel super sympathique.

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: Couldn't have asked for a better stay

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewNegatives: Il manquait juste le petit déjeuner, mais nous pouvions le prendre à 100 mètres.
comments.reviewPositives: Le personnel est très attentionné, vous avez besoin de quelque chose, ils vous l'apportent. Le bbq poisson est excellent. La gentillesse et le service sont les points forts de Diara bungalow. L'emplacement est superbe, avec un spot de snorkelling exceptionnel.

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: Lugar maravilloso. Personal amable.

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewNegatives:
Absolut nicht zu empfehlen! Boden, Wände und Dach nicht dicht, überall Ritzen und Spalten durch die Tiere (Amesien, Moskitos) kommen. Kein Moskitonetz, Matratze komplett durchgelegen, Ventilator defekt, offene Stromkabel, Ameisen im Bad, Toilette ohne Spülung, Dusche ohne Abtrennung, Hängematte komplett verdreckt.
Kommunikation vor Ort mit Personal auf Englisch nicht möglich. Nur über WhatsApp mit Budi, der nicht vor Ort ist. Das erschwert sehr viel.
comments.reviewPositives: Lage direkt am Meer, toller Ausblick

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: Nous avons poussé, repoussé, re-repoussé notre départ. Le bungalow avait vu directement sur la mer, nous pouvions faire du snorkeling du ponton qui était à 2m littéralement de notre logement. Le personnel était très agréable, toujours à nos besoins. On peut manger quelques petits repas confectionnés sur place (des choses très simple). Il est très bien placé, tout peut se faire à pied en moins de 800m: shop, resto, dive center ect! Le logement était propre, nous avions des petits soucis de coupure d’eau tous les jours, mais le personnel remettait en route à chaque fois rapidement.

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewNegatives: Unser Bungalow hatte einen kaputten Boden, man konnte ihn von innen nachts nicht abschliessen und es gab kein fliessendes Wasser, nur abgestandenes Wasser im Wasserbecken. Es gibt aber anscheinend auch bessere Hüttchen, hab ich mir sagen lassen.
comments.reviewPositives: Die Lage direkt am Meer und die Aussicht waren phänomenal.

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: Perfect place ! Absolutely amazing location.

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewPositives: Einer der besten Gastgeber !! nett, hilfreich, aufmerksam und und und. Hatten 4 Tage gebucht, sind 14 Tage geblieben. Bungalow direkt am Wasser, günstig, einfach, aber verhältnismäßig gross mit grosser Veranda. Wasserzugang ůber einen Steg. Sehr gutes Restaurant in der Nähe ( Bee Bee’s, ca 250 m ) und gleich daneben gibt es richtig guten Kaffee !! Die Anfahrt sollte man eventuell vorher organisieren, denn der Bungalow ist etwas weiter entfernt vom Jetty und die Insel ist sehr hügelig. Mit dem Tuk Tuk ca. 50 Minuten Anfahrt. Wer eine einfache Unterkunft direkt am Wasser sucht ist hier 100%ig richtig. Perfekt zum schnorcheln, vom Steg ca 100 m links sieht man noch gut erhaltene Korallen und viele, viele Fische ( Stonefisch, Lionfisch, Muränen, Rochen,Nemos etc. ) Wir hatten eine super Zeit in Pulau Weh.

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: A very good location, less than 10m from coral reefs. Internet wifi was a bit on and off, probably fixed by now. Staff was super friendly. Got some great advice on where the snorkeling was at it's best, which was about 50-100m further north from Diara Bungalows.

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewNegatives:
Sehr alt und schmutzig. Es roch extrem. Ein von zwei Fenstern ließ sich nicht öffnen, so dass noch schlechter gelüftet werden konnte. WiFi funktionierte nicht!! Zwei Damen waren verantwortlich; mit ihnen war die Kommunikation trotz google Translator nicht wirklich möglich. Der Inhaber war nur per WhatsApp zu erreichen. Ich musste ihm schreiben, um zu erreichen, dass nach zwei Tagen der Mülleimer mit dem benutzten Toilettenpapier ausgeleert und das von Beginn an dreckige Zimmer gefegt wurde. Beim Fegen wurde der Dreck einfach auf den Balkon gekehrt. Es war leider offensichtlich, dass es nur darum ging, Geld zu machen mit den Bungalows, da die Lage direkt am Meer attraktiv ist. 

Vorsicht, wenn man direkt unten zum Schnorcheln ins Wasser will! Es gibt sehr viele Seeigel, die immer ein Zeichen für schlechte Wasserqualität sind. Es gibt viele Fische zu sehen, die sich um weniger erhaltene Brocken von Korallen tummeln. Auch zum Schnorcheln ist es entgegen der meisten Angaben nicht wirklich geeignet dort.
comments.reviewPositives: Die Lage direkt am Meer. Sonst nichts

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewNegatives: Unico neo è la connessione internet che, nei primi giorni era sufficientemente veloce, per poi ridursi drasticamente nei successivi 10 GG
comments.reviewPositives: Bungalow in posizione eccezionale, praticamente sul mare, dotato di amaca, dispenser acqua e ventilatore, con arredamento essenziale e bagno spartano, versione indonesiana.Proprietario sempre disponibile e raggiungibile su Wh.

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewNegatives: La struttura è molto approssimativa e non ci sono molti servizi per un buon riscontro qualità-prezzo.
comments.reviewPositives:
Abbiamo trascorso due notti presso Diara bungalow, un luogo totalmente immerso nella natura dove puoi goderti un pieno relax e silenzio.
I bungalow si trovano completamente affacciati sulle acque di iboih beach.

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewNegatives: Tenete a mente che il bungalow da direttamente sul mare,e alle spalle avete il verde. Quindi la possibilità di condividere la vostra stanza con gechi, e qualche topolino è parecchio alta.
comments.reviewPositives:
Ho alloggiato a Diara bungalow per 6 notti. Il mio bungalow dava direttamente sul mare. Mi sento di dire che di tutta l'isola Iboih è il posto migliore per fare snorkeling. In 10 minuti a piedi si è al villaggio,ma si può trovare anche ad 1/2 minuti un ristorante per mangiare .
Lo staff è stato veramente gentile e carino . Sicuramente non è un alloggio per chi cerca il lusso,molto basico. Ma per me è stato ok.
